Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && python3 -c "
from app.models.asset import Asset, TaxType

# PCT_TOTAL: 20% tax on \\$100k → after-tax = \\$80k
a1 = Asset\('Fund', 'Stocks', 100_000, 7.0, TaxType.PCT_TOTAL, 20.0\)
assert a1.after_tax_value == 80_000, a1.after_tax_value
assert a1.annual_tax_cost == 20_000, a1.annual_tax_cost
print\(f'PCT_TOTAL  ok: after_tax={a1.after_tax_value:,.0f}  tax_cost={a1.annual_tax_cost:,.0f}'\)

# PCT_APPRECIATION: bought at \\$60k, now \\$100k → gain=\\$40k, 20% of gain=\\$8k tax
a2 = Asset\('Fund', 'Stocks', 100_000, 7.0, TaxType.PCT_APPRECIATION, 20.0, cost_basis=60_000\)
assert a2.gain == 40_000
assert a2.annual_tax_cost == 8_000
assert a2.after_tax_value == 92_000
print\(f'PCT_APPREC ok: gain={a2.gain:,.0f}  tax_cost={a2.annual_tax_cost:,.0f}  after_tax={a2.after_tax_value:,.0f}'\)

# FLAT_DOLLAR: \\$5k flat tax on \\$300k property
a3 = Asset\('Rental', 'Real Estate', 300_000, 4.0, TaxType.FLAT_DOLLAR, 5_000\)
assert a3.annual_tax_cost == 5_000
assert a3.after_tax_value == 295_000
print\(f'FLAT_DOLLAR ok: after_tax={a3.after_tax_value:,.0f}  tax_cost={a3.annual_tax_cost:,.0f}'\)

# Legacy migration: 'percentage' maps to PCT_TOTAL
d = {'name':'X','asset_class':'Cash','current_value':1000,'annual_roi_pct':2,'tax_type':'percentage','tax_value':10}
a4 = Asset.from_dict\(d\)
assert a4.tax_type == TaxType.PCT_TOTAL
print\('Migration  ok: old percentage -> PCT_TOTAL'\)
print\('All checks passed.'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && python3 -c "
from app.models.debt import Debt, DEBT_CLASSES
from app.models.portfolio import Portfolio
from app.models.settings import AppSettings
from app.services.fire_calculator import FIRECalculator
from app.utils.formatting import fmt, parse_number, CommaEntry
from app.models.asset import Asset, TaxType

# test debt math
d = Debt\('아파트 담보대출', 'Mortgage', 300_000_000, 4.0, 1_500_000\)
print\(f'Debt months remaining: {d.months_remaining:.0f}  \({d.months_remaining/12:.1f} yrs\)'\)

# test per-class projection with debt
p = Portfolio\(\)
a1 = Asset\('삼성전자', 'Stocks', 50_000_000, 8.0, TaxType.PCT_APPRECIATION, 22.0, cost_basis=30_000_000\)
a2 = Asset\('부동산', 'Real Estate', 500_000_000, 3.5, TaxType.FLAT_DOLLAR, 2_000_000\)
p.add_asset\(a1\); p.add_asset\(a2\)
p.add_debt\(d\)

s = AppSettings\(\)
calc = FIRECalculator\(p, s\)
print\(f'Net worth:     {fmt\(calc.total_net_worth, s.currency_symbol\)}'\)
print\(f'Total debt:    {fmt\(calc.total_debt, s.currency_symbol\)}'\)
print\(f'FIRE number:   {fmt\(calc.fire_number, s.currency_symbol\)}'\)
print\(f'FIRE progress: {calc.fire_progress_pct:.2f}%'\)

# per-class contribution
curve, fm = calc.project\({'Stocks': 1_000_000, 'Real Estate': 500_000}, months=480\)
ytf = fm/12 if fm != -1 else None
print\(f'Years to FIRE \(per-class contrib\): {ytf:.1f}' if ytf else 'Never in 40yrs'\)
print\(f'parse_number: {parse_number\(\\"1,500,000\\"\)}'\)
print\('All checks passed.'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && python3 -c "
from app.models.asset import Asset, TaxType
from app.models.portfolio import Portfolio
from app.models.settings import AppSettings
from app.services.fire_calculator import FIRECalculator

p = Portfolio\(\)
p.add_asset\(Asset\('삼성전자', 'Stocks', 50_000_000, 8.0, TaxType.PCT_APPRECIATION, 22.0,
                  cost_basis=30_000_000, monthly_contribution=1_000_000\)\)
p.add_asset\(Asset\('예금', 'Cash', 20_000_000, 2.5, TaxType.PCT_TOTAL, 15.4,
                  monthly_contribution=500_000\)\)

s = AppSettings\(\)
calc = FIRECalculator\(p, s\)
curve, fm = calc.project\(months=480\)
print\(f'Month 0 net worth:  ₩{curve[0]:,.0f}'\)
print\(f'Month 1 net worth:  ₩{curve[1]:,.0f}  \(should be > month 0 from ROI+contribution\)'\)
print\(f'Years to FIRE:      {fm/12:.1f}' if fm != -1 else 'Years to FIRE: Never'\)
print\(f'Total after-tax:    ₩{calc.total_after_tax_value:,.0f}'\)
assert curve[1] > curve[0], 'Portfolio should grow!'
print\('OK'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && python3 -c "
from app.models.asset import Asset, TaxType
from app.components.asset_card import _future_value

a = Asset\('삼성전자', 'Stocks', 50_000_000, 8.0, TaxType.PCT_APPRECIATION, 22.0,
          cost_basis=30_000_000, monthly_contribution=1_000_000\)

print\(f'After-tax value now:  ₩{a.after_tax_value:,.0f}'\)
print\(f'After-tax ROI:        {a.after_tax_roi_pct:.2f}%/yr'\)
print\(f'Monthly contribution: ₩{a.monthly_contribution:,.0f}'\)
print\(f'5yr  후 \(복리\):       ₩{_future_value\(a, 60\):,.0f}'\)
print\(f'10yr 후 \(복리\):       ₩{_future_value\(a, 120\):,.0f}'\)

# verify compounding: manual loop should match closed form
v = a.after_tax_value
r = \(1 + max\(a.after_tax_roi_pct, 0\)/100\)**\(1/12\) - 1
c = a.monthly_contribution
for _ in range\(120\):
    v = v * \(1 + r\) + c
print\(f'10yr loop check:      ₩{v:,.0f}  \(should match above\)'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(python3 -c "
import ast, sys
files = [
    'app/models/settings.py',
    'app/services/theme_manager.py',
    'app/app.py',
    'app/navigation.py',
    'app/views/history_view.py',
    'app/views/settings_view.py',
]
ok = True
for f in files:
    try:
        with open\(f\) as fh:
            ast.parse\(fh.read\(\)\)
        print\(f'OK: {f}'\)
    except SyntaxError as e:
        print\(f'ERROR: {f}: {e}'\)
        ok = False
sys.exit\(0 if ok else 1\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import json, pathlib, sys

path = pathlib.Path.home\(\) / 'Library/Application Support/FIREDashboard/data.json'
if not path.exists\(\):
    print\('No data.json found — defaults will apply on next launch'\)
    sys.exit\(0\)

with open\(path\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)

data.setdefault\('settings', {}\)['theme'] = 'light'
data['settings']['custom_colors'] = {}   # clear any old custom overrides

with open\(path, 'w'\) as f:
    json.dump\(data, f, indent=2\)
print\('Patched data.json → theme: light'\)
")
